caption: This news broadcast from News18 India features a series of graphics regarding Bihar politics. The frames show images of various political figures, including Chief Minister Nitish Kumar and other ministers, alongside a map of Bihar and a graphic noting "2019 लोक सभा कुल सीटें 40." The layout includes a red and yellow color scheme with a News18 India logo. In the early frames, text reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "नीतीश समेत 9 विधायकों ने मंत्री पद की शपथ ली," while subsequent frames transition to text asking "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and stating "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है" and "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने विजय सिन्हा." The visuals shift to show different minister portraits, such as Santosh Suman, Sumit Kumar, Dr. Prem Kumar, and Vijay Choudhary, while the timestamp remains consistent at "10:08 PM."
